mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO employee_flex_attributes(id, d_code_type_1, d_code_type_2, d_code_type_3, d_code_type_4, d_boolean_0, d_code_type_5, d_code_type_6, d_date_2, d_code_type_7, d_code_type_8, d_code_type_9, create_time, update_time) VALUES
(#{item.id}, #{item.dCodeType1}, #{item.dCodeType2}, #{item.dCodeType3}, #{item.dCodeType4}, #{item.dBoolean0}, #{item.dCodeType5}, #{item.dCodeType6}, #{item.dDate2}, #{item.dCodeType7}, #{item.dCodeType8}, #{item.dCodeType9}, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
